basic_details.job_title: District South Bastar Dantewada Chhattisgarh MIS Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: District South Bastar Dantewada Chhattisgarh MIS Assistant Recruitment 2026 is now open for 1 MIS Assistant post. Candidates with a Graduate qualification are eligible to apply through offline applications from 14 May 2026 to 13 June 2026 through the official website www.dantewada.gov.in.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for District South Bastar Dantewada Chhattisgarh MIS Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
